---
title: "Welcome to jueunbonalee"
description: "Introducing my refreshed data science blog"
author: "jueunbonalee"
date: "2026-03-30"
categories: [news, blog]
---

## Hello, World!

Welcome to the refreshed version of my blog. I'll be sharing data science content here in both English and Korean.

Stay tuned for posts on:

- Machine learning tutorials
- Data analysis walkthroughs
- Statistical thinking
- Tools and workflow tips

[🇰🇷 한국어로 읽기](index.ko.qmd)
